message:
test(fnp-python): IEEE 754 special-value parity probe on ufuncs

Adds `ufunc_special_value_parity_matches_numpy` — stress test for ufunc
wrappers on IEEE 754 special inputs. Covers ±inf, ±0 (signed zero),
NaN, subnormal (5e-324), min_positive, ±f64::MAX as unary input, plus
domain-error input pairs for binary ops (0/0, 0**0, fmod-with-zero,
copysign(1, -0)).

Per /testing-conformance-harnesses: signed-zero and NaN behavior are
"user numerical code depending on numpy's exact special-value semantics
would silently miscompute" if divergent — classified as HIGH.

Coverage: 33 unary + 5 binary ufuncs × IEEE special input vector.

Unary ops probed:
  sin cos tan arcsin arccos arctan
  sinh cosh tanh arcsinh arccosh arctanh
  sqrt log log2 log10 exp exp2 expm1 log1p
  sign floor ceil trunc rint
  absolute negative conjugate reciprocal
  signbit isnan isinf isfinite

Binary-with-domain-error cases:
  divide(x, 0)            → inf / -inf / nan / preserved
  true_divide(...)        → same
  power(0, 0) = 1, power(0, 1) = 0, power(1, inf) = 1,
    power(0, -1) = inf, power(-inf, 0) = 1
  fmod(x, 0)              → nan (with warning, silenced in test)
  nextafter(1, 2), (0, 1), (-0, -1)
  copysign(1, -0) = -1    (signed-zero preservation)

Each pair compared via numpy.array_equal(equal_nan=True) plus dtype
parity. RuntimeWarnings suppressed via warnings.filterwarnings so the
test measures output values, not stderr streams.

RESULT: zero divergences. Every IEEE 754 special produces identical
output value AND dtype across fnp_python and numpy.

SIXTH consecutive review cycle returning zero HIGH/CRITICAL divergences:
  Cycle 4: adversarial error surface (8)
  Cycle 5: adversarial + axis OOB (26)
  Cycle 6: metamorphic invariants (9)
  Cycle 7: dtype-promotion parity (~70)
  Cycle 8: shape/axis edges (~65)
  Cycle 9: IEEE 754 special values (this commit, ~250 cells)

Total probe coverage: ~428 cases × 6 conformance dimensions = zero
divergences. The fnp-python surface is pummeled tight against numpy.

Verified via:
  export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_franken_numpy_cc
  cargo test -p fnp-python --lib ufunc_special_value_parity
1 passed, 0 failed, finished in 0.14s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
